feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1909 201 1708 81
US 1765 176 1589 64

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Even Longer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → Free [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • PRO Lifetime：$39.99
  • PRO Yearly Subscription：$9.99
  • PRO Monthly Subscription：$2.99

Application Description

Transform Your iPhone into a Professional Long Exposure Camera with Even Longer Unleash your creativity and capture stunning long exposure photos right from your iPhone with Even Longer. Whether you’re a professional photographer or an enthusiastic amateur, this app offers four incredible capture modes to elevate your photography: Capture Modes: • Frame Averaging Mode: Create beautiful motion blur with ease. • Light Trails Mode: Perfect for capturing dynamic light movements. • Star Trails Mode: Achieve unmatched quality in star trails photography with advanced algorithms that reduce disturbances like airplanes. • Night Mode (PRO members only): Experience shutter speeds up to 30 times longer than any other third-party camera app, reaching up to 30 seconds (or 10 seconds on older devices). Go PRO for Even More Features: Unlock the full potential of Even Longer with our optional PRO membership, which includes: • RAW Support: Available for all modes (except some ultra-wide cameras). • Intervalometer: Capture time-lapse sequences with precision. • Parallel Bracketing: Achieve perfect long exposures with multiple shots. • Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures. • Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos. • Exclusive Night Mode: Push the limits of your night photography. Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects. Get Started Today: Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference. Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Cello Tuner Professional
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：$3.99 → $1.99 [$0.99 ~ $3.99]
  • Settings：$3.99 → $1.99 [$0.99 ~ $3.99]

All Price Information

Price：$9.99

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：$1.99
  • Settings：$1.99

Application Description

Tune your cello instantly with precision and ease! Optimal for beginners, intermediate and advanced musicians! · The most accurate - displays the exact sound frequency in Hz. · Calibration for A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Instant load and fastest tuning! - Optimized for latest devices. · Highest responsiveness and sensitivity. · Intuitive user interface with LED tuning indicator. · Visual indicators - tuned string lights up. · Universal app - works with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch. · Advanced settings (A4 calibration, Mic sensitivity, Sound notifications) and Tuning fork! (as in-app purchases) What our users say: "Does what it promises - Very useful app." "This app makes tuning so easy!" "By far the greatest and most accurate cello tuning app. Play the string, read its chart and you know whether you're in tune." "Amazing! Outstanding, well spent money! "All cellists should have this app!" "It's very useful for me! Thank you!" "Excellent app" "Very convenient software. Suitable for any skill!" --- Please make sure to allow microphone access to this app when prompted. Check it under Settings>Privacy>Microphone. Thank you. --- Got ideas? Questions? Please send us your feedback through our site or to feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 墨墨记忆卡｜考研考公考证外语学习闪卡
entry.id: 墨墨记忆卡｜考研考公考证外语学习闪卡-us-1775531867945
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 增加 500 个记忆币：$0.99
  • 增加 1 个补签卡：$0.99
  • 增加 800 个记忆币：$1.99
  • 月卡：$3.99
  • 增加 4000 个记忆币：$7.99
  • 增加 1800 个记忆币：$3.99
  • 年卡：$24.99
  • 增加 8000 个记忆币：$12.99
  • 季卡：$8.99
  • 增加 16000 个记忆币：$24.99

Application Description

墨墨记忆卡 可以帮助你科学高效地规划需要记忆的知识，对抗遗忘。 - 可以把知识编辑成卡片，目前支持文字、图片、声音。 - 可以把自己的知识卡片分享给朋友，也可以搜索他人的卡片进行学习。 - 可以把知识卡片加入记忆规划，墨墨记忆卡 会为你安排合适的时间进行复习。 - 可以查看自己的记忆数据：遗忘曲线、记忆持久度、每日学习情况。 - 可以每日签到，见证自己的坚持和成长。 墨墨科技多年以来一直专注于记忆领域的探索，基于对 1300+ 亿条用户记忆行为数据的研究和统计，绘制了 3000+ 万条不同用户的遗忘曲线，协助用户高效规划自己的记忆。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Thumper: Pocket Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $3.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

*** Winner of Apple Design Award 2019 *** Thumper is rhythm violence: classic action, blistering speed, and brutal physicality. You are a space beetle. Brave the void and confront a maniacal giant head. With this special pocket edition, you can play all nine epic levels with one hand. Hurtle forward, master new moves, and survive terrifying boss battles. Propelled by a pounding original soundtrack, you'll feel every crushing impact. To reach synesthetic bliss, you must conquer rhythm hell. ■ Features ■ ・ Nine epic levels ・ Adrenalizing boss battles ・ Psychedelic visuals and original soundtrack ・ Smooth 60 FPS in portrait and landscape (and up to 120 FPS on supported devices) ・ PLAY + mode (increased challenge and speed) ・ Full screen display on iPhone X ・ iCloud Sync ■ Please Note ■ Wireless headphones can add significant audio latency. For the best experience, wired headphones or integrated speakers are strongly recommended.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Tokyo Dispatcher! 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $1.49 [$0.29 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.49

Application Description

Dispatch Japanese trains! ・Simple brain game "Train Dispatcher!2" is a brain game with simple rules. No expertise required. Train fans, game fans, everyone can enjoy it. ・To everyone who will become a train dispatcher In the morning in Japan, customers are waiting for the arrival of the train to go to work. Let's start the train and transport the customers. ・Goal of the game Japanese railway companies are for-profit organizations. Let's aim for high operating profit! ・How to make profit Fare revenue - Departure cost = Operating profit. Fare revenue is generated when passengers board at a station. Example) If two passengers board a train at a station with a fare of 20, the company receives 40. Departure costs are charged according to the number of cars when the train departs. Example) 30 for a 2-car train, 40 for a 4-car train, and 70 for a 10-car train. One person can ride in one car. Fare revenue is generated when customers board the train. Adjust the driving schedule and the number of vehicles to aim for the highest profit. Departure costs. If you run too many trains and the occupancy rate drops, you'll lose revenue. ・How to operate The game is very easy to operate and the rules are simple. All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time. As the game progresses, various variations such as express trains and transfer stations will appear. ・Volume Enjoy over 50 routes. Please experience the wide variety of transportation strategies of Japanese railway companies. No ads, no charges. ・No ads, no billing Please concentrate on the game. Children can also enjoy the game. Share your results on Social Media. ・Train lines you can play with JR East Japan JR Tokai JR West Japan JR Kyushu Tobu Tokyu Seibu Keio Keikyu Keihan Hankyu Hanshin Kintetsu Meitetsu Odakyu Nankai Seitetsu Sotetsu Keisei Tokyo Metro Osaka Metro Toei Subway Tsukuba Express ・Capacity is about 130MB The storage burden is also small. There is no heavy processing at all.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Raiders Map
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Raider Mk. 2：$17.99 → $5.99 [$5.99 ~ $17.99]
  • Raider Mk. 3：$29.99 → $9.99 [$9.99 ~ $29.99]
  • Raider Mk. 1：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Raider Mk. 2：$5.99
  • Raider Mk. 3：$9.99
  • Raider Mk. 1：$0.99
  • Raider Weekly：$1.99

Application Description

All in one app for an Interactive Map, Loot locations, Material list and breakdown list, Enemy drop list, guides and quest-line guides. - Interactive Maps - Sort and Filter - Event Timers and Notifications - Guides for Quests Guides and Maps are partially available for free, but a Pro membership is required to access all content Raiders Map is the best tool for easy access to everything, along with world class support. You can reach me directly on X for help or to report any issues: All4nDev, or through discord. Not affiliated with embark. Raiders Map is independently owned and managed. apple standard EULA https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: Waterlogue: Photo to Painting
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：$24.99 → $19.99 [$19.99 ~ $29.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Monthly)：$3.99
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Yearly)：$9.99
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：$19.99

Application Description

You don’t need to paint to create beautiful watercolor images—Waterlogue captures the essence of your photos in brilliant, liquid color. See the world like an artist. FEATURES: • Create art that looks hand-painted • Photos become luminous watercolors in seconds • Expressive styles for portraits, landscapes, and more • Beautiful results for people and pets • Print-quality export for frameable art • Simulated watercolor, not AI • Private by design—your photos never leave your device • Customize borders, lightness, and detail ACCLAIM: • Over one million sold since 2013 • Awarded "App Store Best of 2014" by Apple • Featured as App Store App of the Day • Oprah's holiday pick! "Made with Love: DIY Gifts"—O, The Oprah Magazine • “…with Waterlogue, it’s clear that there’s a very thoughtful human touch behind the app’s painterly algorithms.” —WIRED • “…Waterlogue is going to utterly amaze you, as it’s the first app I’ve seen that gives results that really look like a watercolor painting.” —Cult of Mac • “Watercolor apps may not be a new idea, but Waterlogue does it in a gorgeous, intuitive way, and it’s quite a pleasure to use.” —AppAdvice.com • “It goes beyond typical Photoshop watercolor filters because it has more visual intelligence, and more of the feel of the real paint.” —James Gurney, Artist and Author of Dinotopia • From Tinrocket, creator of This by Tinrocket (App Store Best of 2016), Olli (App Store Best of 2017), and more KEEP UP WITH TINROCKET: • Follow @Tinrocket on Instagram for the latest! • We’re here to help: If you have a question or need assistance, you can always email us at support@tinrocket.com • If you like Waterlogue, please consider leaving an App Store review or rating. Every review counts and helps indie developers like ourselves. Waterlogue® and See the world like an artist® are registered trademarks of Tinrocket, LLC

entry.title: Only You Are Here
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.29 [Free ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.29

In-App Purchases

  • "Time"：$0.49
  • Donation I：$0.99
  • Donation III：$4.99
  • Donation II：$1.99

Application Description

Only You Are Here — an atmospheric adventure with first-person horror elements. Take on the role of a person trapped inside their dream. This place is filled with a mix of memories and nightmares. To get out, you have to open a small door. Immerse yourself in the game's history, walk through many endings, and discover the key secret.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Wipr 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $2.99 [$2.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

In-App Purchases

  • Monthly Recurring Tip：$1.99
  • Tip：$4.99
  • Yearly Recurring Tip：$9.99
  • Mega Tip：$19.99

Application Description

Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly. Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap. Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese. Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported. Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”. This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it. – Kaylee Terms & Conditions: https://kaylees.site/terms-and-conditions.html
